title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination · State Clinic: Context Forking
summary: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops context forking increment in a bounded multi-agent execution map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Give a subagent the minimum context required without losing governing constraints.
Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
